title: Branded Chelsea Living | 2BR | Waterfront Views
raw_area: Chelsea Residence by Damac, Maritime City, Dubai
description:
Where London prestige meets Dubai’s waterfront brilliance — welcome to Chelsea Residences by DAMAC, an exclusive collection of branded homes inspired by the legacy of Chelsea F.C. and the elegance of coastal living.

This expansive 2-bedroom residence, covering 1,610 sqft, offers a masterfully crafted layout with refined interiors, sweeping sea views, and a seamless flow between indoor comfort and outdoor serenity. Designed for those who demand excellence, every corner of this home reflects premium craftsmanship, curated aesthetics, and a branded lifestyle unlike any other in the city.

Key Features:
• Grand 2-bedroom layout with premium fittings and finishes
• Open-plan living and dining spaces with floor-to-ceiling windows
• Designer kitchen, spa-style bathrooms, and generous storage
• Starting from AED 4,575,000

Signature Wellness & Lifestyle Amenities:
• Rooftop Stamford Pitch & Football Simulation Room
• Coral swing, Aqua gym, and Chelsea Lion Beach
• Rain therapy, halotherapy, cryotherapy, and starlit wellness spaces
• Infinity pool, forest-inspired pods, and jogging track
• Exclusive dining, wellness concierge, and power lounge

Location Advantages:
• Located in Dubai Maritime City, just 15 mins from Downtown Dubai
• Waterfront living between Burj Khalifa and Jumeirah Beach
• Close to Mina Rashid and future cruise terminals
• Excellent connectivity to Sheikh Zayed Road

Flexible Payment Plan:
• 20% upon booking
• 40% during construction (1% monthly for 42 months)
• 40% on handover (Q4 2029)
• 4% DLD fee + admin charges at booking

Own a statement of style and substance. Contact us today to reserve your place in one of Dubai’s most prestigious waterfront developments — Chelsea Residences by DAMAC.

ai_analysis.quality_context: Chelsea Residences by DAMAC offers a premium branded living experience with a sports-centric luxury theme. At 1,610 sqft, this 2-bedroom unit is exceptionally spacious compared to standard Dubai 2BR layouts. The pricing of AED 2,842/sqft represents a significant discount (~33%) against the stated market median of AED 4,260/sqft, indicating strong entry-value potential for a branded waterfront development.
risk_flags: Location Discrepancy: The listing metadata specifies 'Dubai Islands' while the description places the project in 'Dubai Maritime City'. These are distinct sub-markets with different infrastructure timelines and pricing dynamics.
Extended Handover Timeline: Completion is slated for Q4 2029, exposing investors to a 5-year capital lock-up and mid-term market cycle fluctuations.
Niche Brand Appeal: The Chelsea F.C. branding is highly specific and may limit resale liquidity to a niche demographic compared to neutral luxury or fashion brands.
Handover Payment Concentration: A 40% payment is due upon handover in 2029, requiring significant liquidity or mortgage approval at that future date.
ai_analysis.investment_summary: An attractive off-plan opportunity for capital appreciation, driven by a low entry price per sqft (AED 2,842 vs. AED 4,260 market median) and a highly favorable 1% monthly payment plan. The branded nature (DAMAC x Chelsea F.C.) adds novelty, but the 2029 handover timeline and critical location discrepancy between Dubai Islands and Dubai Maritime City must be resolved before committing capital. Best suited for long-term investors looking for waterfront exposure at a discount.

ai_analysis.quality_context: Burj Daman is a premium, highly sought-after mixed-use development in the heart of DIFC, offering excellent build quality, spacious layouts (2,091 sqft for a 3BR is highly competitive), and immediate proximity to high-end retail and dining like Gate Avenue and Zuma. The unit features highly desirable elements such as floor-to-ceiling windows, a large balcony with skyline views, and dedicated basement parking, making it highly attractive to high-earning corporate tenants.
risk_flags: Critical Location Discrepancy: The listing metadata specifies 'Dubai Islands' as the area, whereas the description and building (Burj Daman) are located in 'DIFC'. These are entirely different submarkets with distinct pricing dynamics.

Significant Underpricing: At AED 2,846/sqft compared to the stated market median of AED 4,190/sqft, the property is listed at a ~32% discount. This extreme variance suggests a potential listing error, a distressed sale, or undisclosed property issues.

Unknown Tenancy Status: The listing does not clarify if the unit is vacant on transfer or tenanted. If tenanted, rental yields may be capped by RERA regulations, limiting immediate rental income optimization.
ai_analysis.investment_summary: On paper, this property presents an incredibly lucrative arbitrage opportunity, offering a premium DIFC asset at a 32% discount to the market median. Burj Daman commands strong rental demand from financial sector professionals, promising high yields and solid capital preservation. However, the severe discrepancy between the listed area (Dubai Islands) and the actual property location (DIFC), combined with the aggressive underpricing, demands rigorous due diligence. Investors must verify title deed details, vacancy status, and actual seller motivation before proceeding.

Where coastal calm meets urban pulse.
Soulever by Beyond is Dubai Maritime City’s new architectural icon – two sculptural towers rising above the sea, blending natural serenity with refined design. Developed by Beyond Developments under Omniyat Group, Soulever captures Dubai’s maritime legacy through elegant architecture and breathtaking panoramas of the Cove, the Forest, and the city skyline.

Expansive windows flood the interiors with daylight and soothing marina views. Residents enjoy access to world-class amenities, including a heated infinity pool, state-of-the-art gym, yoga and wellness areas, spa, library, residents lounge, event space, kids play area, and a beautifully landscaped podium park with cafés and retail avenues.

Perfectly positioned just 5 minutes from Mina Rashid and 15 minutes from Downtown Dubai, Soulever offers the perfect balance between vibrant city life and tranquil beachfront living.
